steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to describe the research methodology — i.e., what the researchers did. Methodology = the test setup, including the experimental and control conditions.

steps.title: Match the goal to a choice
steps.content:
Choice C describes the test design: 125 ingested seeds and 125 non-ingested control seeds. A states the goal, B states a result, D states one specific result number. Only C captures the methodology.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
